phrase: Who does not walk in the counsel of the wicked
Nor stand in the way of sinners
Nor sit in the seat of mockers
concept: Who does not follow the counsel of the wicked
Nor stand in the path of sinners
lyric: Who does not walk with the wicked

phrase: Instead, his delight is in the law of Yahweh
And in his law he meditates day and night
concept: Instead, he delights in Yahweh's law
He meditates on his law day and night
lyric: His delight is in Yahweh's law
He dwells on his law day and night

phrase: Day to day it pours forth speech and night to night
concept: Day to day it pours forth speech and night to night
lyric: Day to day it pours forth speech and night to night

phrase_contains: For the sake of his name
more than snow i will become white
A heart pure create for me o god
a spirit steadfast renew in my inner being
My lord my lips you will open
Burnt offering not you are pleased with
